title: AI Trading Platform
author: Trading-Noob169
selftext: [Developed by QuantGate Systems, Stealth Trader is a special decision assistance tool for active traders. Stealth Trader uses real-time Sentiment and Perception data to forecast market moves, in contrast to other trading systems that rely on lagging price-volume-time indicators. It is unique in that it is the first system in the world to analyze market participants' behavior in real time using the concepts of mathematical psychology as well as AI and machine learning elements. It predicts possible price moves with exceptional accuracy by taking complex mathematical algorithms and extracting buying and selling pressure from order flow.Stealth Trader is a cockpit-like interface designed to promote quick and simple decision-making. It draws inspiration from military navigation systems. With the use of cutting-edge ideas like reversion to the mean, flocking and herding, and spontaneous synchronization, traders can predict market moves based on group behavior patterns rather than discrete data points.With the use of easy to read gauges, Stealth Trader's innovative methodology reduces complicated market data into actionable insights, facilitating traders' ability to respond quickly and accurately. With its roots in mathematical psychology, it provides a cutting-edge substitute for traditional trading tools by tracking and predicting market sentiment.If you’re interested in trying Stealth Trader for yourself take advantage of the one week free trial by emailing julian@quantgatesystems.com and get started today.](https://preview.redd.it/0zvh2w0nhujd1.png?width=1080&format=png&auto=webp&s=549e4c5656d024865b23f953a9fa6b5982bf914a)
